headline: Trump-Xi Summit Stays on Track Despite China’s Iran Concerns
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump is forging ahead with plans to hold a summit with counterpart Xi Jinping next week in Beijing, despite unease among Chinese officials about holding the high-stakes meeting before the war in Iran is resolved.
